title: Veterans UnAffairs: The Frank Gann Story
original_title: Veterans UnAffairs: The Frank Gann Story
overview: In a first K2 Visuals original documentary, K2 Visuals founder, Kenneth Irwin II, is lucky enough to sit down with Veteran, Frank Gann, and talk to him about his time in the military, the experiments he was involved with, and how one clerk at a VA cost him a whole lot.
